memoryArtifacts.headline: Clan Forrester History
memoryArtifacts.description:
It is possible that this family is of Celtic druidic origin, descending from Marnin the Forester, who held lands in Dunipace, Stirlingshire, about 1200.

Monument at Flodden Field Sir Adam Forrester …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine於1285年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可斯東普時，他的父親William Forrester15歲，母親Wifebro Adft15歲。他和Agnes Margaret Dundas至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1365年在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可斯東普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine于1285年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安可斯東普时，他的父亲William Forrester15岁，母亲Wifebro Adft15岁。他和Agnes Margaret Dundas至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1365年在他的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安可斯東普。

nameMeanings.name: Forrester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English forester ‘officer in charge of a forest or lord's hunting ground’ (Old French forestier, Anglo-Norman forester). See Forrest .

variants.name: Forrest
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper or worker in one. Middle English forest was not, as today, a near-synonym of wood, but referred specifically to a large area of woodland reserved by law for the purposes of hunting by the king and his nobles. The same applied to the European cognates, both ancient Germanic and Romance. The English word is from Middle English forest ‘forest’, Old French forest, Late Latin forestis (silva). This is generally taken to be a derivative of foris ‘outside’; the reference was probably to woods lying outside a settlement. On the other hand, Middle High German for(e)st has been held to be a derivative of Old High German foraha ‘fir’ (see Forster ), with the addition of a collective suffix.
Irish: this name is also frequently attested in Ireland, where it may be a variant of   Forrestal  .

variants.name: Forester
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester   (see   Forrest  ).

variants.name: Forrister
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester  .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: English: shortened form of   Forrester  , an occupational name for someone who worked in a forest.
English: possibly a Norman French nickname or occupational name from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors or shears, cutler’. Compare Force and Forse .

German (mainly Förster): agent derivative of Middle High German forst ‘forest’, denoting someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or who worked in one (see Forst ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Foerster .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine was born in 1285, in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, William Forrester, was 15 and his mother, Wifebro Adft, was 15. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Agnes Margaret Dundas. He died in 1365, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine est né en 1285, à Corstorphine, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Forrester, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Wifebro Adft, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Agnes Margaret Dundas. Il est décédé en 1365, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Corstorphine, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine 1285 in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Forrester 15 und seine Mutter Wifebro Adft 15. Er hatte mit Agnes Margaret Dundas mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine è nato il nel 1285 nel Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, William Forrester, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Wifebro Adft, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Agnes Margaret Dundas. Morì nel 1365, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphineが1285年にスコットランドミドロスアンコルストルフィンで生まれた時，父William Forresterは15歳，母Wifebro Adftは15歳であった。彼はAgnes Margaret Dundasとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1365年に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドミドロスアンコルストルフィンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine(이)가 1285년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 코르스토르필인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Forrester(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Wifebro Adft(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Agnes Margaret Dundas(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 코르스토르필인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine nasceu em 1285, em Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William Forrester, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Wifebro Adft, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Agnes Margaret Dundas. Ele faleceu em 1365, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Corstorphine, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine родился в 1285 г. в местности корсторфаин, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Forrester было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Wifebro Adft, 15. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Agnes Margaret Dundas. Он умер в 1365 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности корсторфаин, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine nació en 1285, en Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, William Forrester, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Wifebro Adft, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Agnes Margaret Dundas. Murió en 1365, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Corstorphine, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
